sku_id: Chemical Guys 16-Piece Car Washing & Interior Detailing Kit - Vehicle Wash Kit with Camo Bucket, Torq Foam Cleaner,

videos.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style satisfying result ad video.
Timeline:
0-3s: Start with a satisfying real-life result. Close-up of thick white foam being sprayed onto a dirty car panel. The foam lifts dirt and grime on contact, and a quick rinse reveals a gleaming wet surface underneath.
3-6s: Show the real pain point behind the result. dried mud splashes, bug splatter, and road grime baked onto the car exterior after a week of driving using a regular garden hose with no pressure, scrubbing with a sponge that leaves swirl marks, and still seeing dirt streaks after drying
6-10s: Show the product solving the problem clearly. connect Chemical Guys 16-Piece Car Washing and Interior Detailing Kit to the garden hose, fill the soap reservoir, and spray thick foam across the car exterior foam clings to dirt, and a quick rinse reveals a spotless glossy surface
Keep the pacing fast, realistic, and product-focused.
Do not use exaggerated magic effects.
Do not invent product functions.
Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.
